summary: Graffiticode charting dialect — compiles to Apache ECharts (bar / line / pie + donut + nightingale-rose), single-series or composed via the `chart` wrapper.
in_scope: Bar, line, and pie chart series (pie includes donut via inner-radius and nightingale rose via rose-type)
Multi-series compositions and dual y-axis layouts via the `chart` wrapper
Theming (dark / light), named ECharts color palettes, Tailwind v3 color tokens resolved to hex at compile time

Plotting data given inline, OR data bound from an upstream data-sourcing dialect (L0170) via the `data` primitive — so a chart request whose values must be fetched from the web or transformed is in scope and composes with L0170
out_of_scope: Relational / network charts (graph, sankey, tree, treemap, sunburst)
Scatter, radar, gauge, heatmap, boxplot, candlestick, funnel — out of scope for v1, slot in later
Interactive editing, formulas, or per-cell scoring (use L0166 for spreadsheets)

Fetching or transforming external data ITSELF — L0173 renders values given inline or bound from an upstream data-sourcing dialect (L0170); it does not fetch or reshape data on its own (compose with L0170 for that)
